name: Smitty's Towing
tagline: The Central Coast's largest towing and recovery fleet — family-run since 1992.
seoDescription: Smitty's Towing — light to heavy-duty towing and recovery across Santa Barbara County since 1992. 24/7 roadside help in Goleta, Buellton, Lompoc & Santa Maria.

hero.heading: From a flat tire to a flipped big rig.
hero.subheading: Light, medium, and heavy-duty towing and recovery across Santa Barbara County, 24/7 — backed by a fleet of over fifty trucks and 360° rotators.

images.heroAlt: Smitty's Towing in Santa Barbara County, CA

about.heading: Built on the Central Coast since 1992
body: Smitty's opened in 1992 to fill a real gap on the Central Coast: a towing outfit that could handle the heavy, awkward jobs nobody else wanted to touch. We started in heavy-duty recovery, added light-duty towing the very next year, and never looked back.

Today we run one of the largest towing and recovery fleets in Central California — over fifty trucks, from light service vehicles to heavy wreckers and 360° rotators — out of yards in Goleta, Buellton, Lompoc, and Santa Maria. Whatever the situation, day or night, we've got the truck and the crew for it.

services.title: Light & medium-duty towing
services.description: Cars, trucks, and vans moved safely on flatbeds and wheel-lifts, anywhere in Santa Barbara County.

services.title: Heavy-duty recovery & rotators
services.description: Overturned big rigs, heavy equipment, and water recoveries handled by 360° rotators and operators who've seen it all.

services.title: 24/7 roadside assistance
services.description: Flat tires, jump starts, lockouts, and fuel delivery — one call gets a truck rolling, any hour of the night.

services.title: Motorcycle & EV towing
services.description: Specialized, damage-free transport for motorcycles, plus manufacturer-authorized towing for electric vehicles.

services.title: Secure impound & storage
services.description: Gated, inside storage yards across the county keep recovered and impounded vehicles safe.

hoursNote: Emergency dispatch never closes — call (805) 683-8982 any time.

steps.title: Call dispatch
steps.body: One number, any hour: (805) 683-8982. Tell us where you are and what you're driving.

steps.title: Nearest truck rolls
steps.body: We dispatch from the closest of four yards in Goleta, Buellton, Lompoc, or Santa Maria.

steps.title: The right equipment
steps.body: From flatbeds to 360° rotators — we bring the truck the job actually needs.

steps.title: Back on the road
steps.body: Safe recovery, fair pricing, and a tow operator who's seen it all.

items.q: Do you handle heavy and commercial recovery?
items.a: Yes — we run heavy wreckers and 360° rotators for overturned big rigs, equipment, and water recoveries.

items.q: Can you tow my EV or motorcycle?
items.a: We do both — damage-free motorcycle transport and manufacturer-authorized EV towing.

items.q: How fast can you get to me?
items.a: Dispatch is 24/7 and we roll the nearest of four yards, so help is rarely far.
All of Santa Barbara County, from Goleta to Santa Maria.

sections.heading: Need a tow right now?
sections.text: 24/7 dispatch across Santa Barbara County — light-duty to heavy recovery.
